predictions.question: Bitcoin Up or Down on April 26?
predictions.reasoning_excerpt:
# Assessment

Bitcoin is currently up +0.48% intraday, trading at $77,956.50 versus the open of $77,582.00. For this contract to resolve YES, BTC only needs to close above the open price—a threshold it has already exceeded by ~$375. With only ~7 hours remaining until resolution (16:00 UTC), Bitcoin would need to reverse sharply and close below the open to fail this condition.
